reward_contract.note: reward_total is only comparable within runs that share the same reward_mode/reward_family. Use terminal service metrics and order_level_ret_mean for cross-mode interpretation.

benchmark_metadata.command: python scripts/benchmark_control_reward.py --reward-mode control_v1 --algo recurrent_ppo --w-bo 4.0 --w-cost 0.02 --w-disr 0.0 --seeds 11 22 33 44 55 --train-timesteps 500000 --eval-episodes 20 --step-size-hours 168 --max-steps 260 --risk-level increased --stochastic-pt --observation-version v4 --eval-risk-levels increased severe --output-dir outputs/benchmarks/final_recurrent_ppo_v4_control_500k
